hints.description: This company is a global leader in specialty glass and ceramics, producing materials and technologies for displays, optical communications, and life sciences. They are a key supplier to the display industry, providing cover glass for smartphones and tablets, and also manufacture optical fiber and cable used in high-speed internet networks. CEO Wendell P. *** has led the company through significant transformations and innovations.
hints.funFact1: Founded in 1868 by A. Augustus *** and Amory ***, the company initially focused on producing glass for railroad signal lanterns, playing a crucial role in the expansion of the American railway system.
hints.funFact2: During World War II, the company developed the "Victory" line of Pyrex glassware to help conserve metal needed for the war effort, encouraging home cooks to replace metal cookware with glass.
